aboutUs.description: do-pracy.pl is the first platform in Poland that enables the rental and sale of small spaces - from garages and storage units to utility rooms. Our goal is to make online transactions fast and secure for both owners and tenants. With do-pracy.pl, you can easily add listings, manage payments, and monitor space availability. The platform combines innovative technology with an intuitive interface, ensuring a smooth and user-friendly experience. Discover how do-pracy.pl is transforming the rental market in Poland by enabling quick, safe, and transparent transactions.

accessibility.description: At do-pracy.pl, we prioritize accessibility - our website and app meet the WCAG 2.1 AA standard, support screen readers, and maintain proper contrast. We make sure every user can use the platform comfortably and without barriers.

home.description: Welcome to do-pracy.pl - an innovative platform for renting and selling small spaces in Poland. We offer fast and secure solutions for property owners who want to earn income and for tenants seeking available spaces. Our platform allows you to easily browse listings, add your own, manage payments, and monitor availability. With modern tools and an intuitive interface, do-pracy.pl ensures convenience and transaction security, whether you're looking for a garage, warehouse, or office space.

jsonLdStructured.description: do-pracy.pl is the first platform in Poland dedicated specifically to the rental and sale of small spaces. A garage, parking spot, basement, storage unit, or small warehouse - each of these spaces can become an additional source of income. We created do-pracy.pl to connect owners of unused spaces with people who need them - simply, locally, and without unnecessary formalities. Our goal is for every do-pracy.pl user to feel safe and comfortable, which is why we ensure clear regulations, data protection, and transparent listing rules. By using the do-pracy.pl platform, you can earn money from what you already have - gain extra income of even several thousand PLN per year, help others - your basement can become a bike storage, and your garage a secure parking spot, and above all, it’s easy to use - posting a listing takes just 3 minutes. do-pracy.pl is a Polish platform created with local needs in mind, helping your unused space start working for you!
jsonLdStructured.name: do-pracy.pl
